{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketer",
  "description": "Finda Logistics Services Limited is a specialized logistics consulting and solutions company helping businesses build efficient, scalable, and resilient supply chain operations across Nigeria. We provide end-to-end advisory services covering logistics strategy, transportation management, warehousing optimization, and last-mile delivery systems.

By integrating data-driven analysis with real-world operational experience, we help organizations reduce logistics costs, improve service delivery, and enhance customer satisfaction. Our consulting framework aligns global logistics best practices with local market realities, enabling our clients to navigate complex distribution environments with confidence. At Finda Logistics Services Limited, we don&rsquo;t just move goods &mdash; we design smarter logistics systems that drive growth, efficiency, and long-term value.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative, data-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to join our team.
	In this role, you&rsquo;ll be the architect of our online presence, responsible for driving brand awareness, traffic, and conversions across all digital channels.


Key Responsibilities


	Campaign Management: Design, execute, and monitor integrated campaigns across SEO, SEM, email, and social media.
	Content Strategy: Create engaging copy and oversee the production of visual assets for various platforms.
	Data Analysis: Use tools like Google Analytics to track KPIs, provide insights, and optimize ROI.
	Paid Media: Manage and optimize budgets for PPC (Google Ads) and paid social (Meta, LinkedIn, etc.).
	SEO/SEM: Perform keyword research and on-page/off-peak optimization to improve organic rankings.


Education &amp; Experience


	Education: Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.
	Experience: 2 &ndash; 4 years of proven experience in a digital marketing role (agency or in-house).
	Certifications: Google Ads or HubSpot certifications are highly preferred.


Other Requirements:


	Must stay up-to-date with the latest trends and best practices in online marketing and measurement.
	Occasional availability for weekend campaign launches or event coverage.


Skills &amp; Qualifications:


	Technical: Proficiency in Google Ads, Meta Business Suite, and SEO tools (e.g., SEMrush or Ahrefs).
	Analytical: Strong ability to interpret complex data and turn it into actionable strategies.
	Creative: Excellent copywriting skills and an eye for high-performing visual content.
	Soft Skills: Adaptability in a fast-paced environment and strong project management capabilities.


Remuneration &amp; Benefits


	Salary: Competitive monthly salary based on experience (typically N780,000 &ndash;&nbsp; N1,200,000).
	Benefits: Health, dental, and vision insurance; 401(k) matching; and flexible PTO.
	Work Environment: Hybrid or remote work options available.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to:&nbsp;findalogisticsservicesltd.hr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Ready to grow with us?&nbsp;If you&rsquo;re a digital native with a passion for storytelling and numbers, we want to hear from you.",

Digital Marketer Job at Finda Logistics Services Limited




        
    

        
        Finda Logistics Services Limited is a specialized logistics consulting and solutions company helping businesses build efficient, scalable, and resilient supply chain operations across Nigeria. We provide end-to-end advisory services covering logistics strategy, transportation management, warehousing optimization, and last-mile delivery systems.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



By integrating data-driven analysis with real-world operational experience, we help organizations reduce logistics costs, improve service delivery, and enhance customer satisfaction. Our consulting framework aligns global logistics best practices with local market realities, enabling our clients to navigate complex distribution environments with confidence. At Finda Logistics Services Limited, we don’t just move goods — we design smarter logistics systems that drive growth, efficiency, and long-term value.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative, data-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to join our team.
	In this role, you’ll be the architect of our online presence, responsible for driving brand awareness, traffic, and conversions across all digital channels.


Key Responsibilities


	Campaign Management: Design, execute, and monitor integrated campaigns across SEO, SEM, email, and social media.
	Content Strategy: Create engaging copy and oversee the production of visual assets for various platforms.
	Data Analysis: Use tools like Google Analytics to track KPIs, provide insights, and optimize ROI.
	Paid Media: Manage and optimize budgets for PPC (Google Ads) and paid social (Meta, LinkedIn, etc.).
	SEO/SEM: Perform keyword research and on-page/off-peak optimization to improve organic rankings.


Education & Experience


	Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.
	Experience: 2 – 4 years of proven experience in a digital marketing role (agency or in-house).
	Certifications: Google Ads or HubSpot certifications are highly preferred.


Other Requirements:


	Must stay up-to-date with the latest trends and best practices in online marketing and measurement.
	Occasional availability for weekend campaign launches or event coverage.


Skills & Qualifications:


	Technical: Proficiency in Google Ads, Meta Business Suite, and SEO tools (e.g., SEMrush or Ahrefs).
	Analytical: Strong ability to interpret complex data and turn it into actionable strategies.
	Creative: Excellent copywriting skills and an eye for high-performing visual content.
	Soft Skills: Adaptability in a fast-paced environment and strong project management capabilities.


Remuneration & Benefits


	Salary: Competitive monthly salary based on experience (typically N780,000 –  N1,200,000).
	Benefits: Health, dental, and vision insurance; 401(k) matching; and flexible PTO.
	Work Environment: Hybrid or remote work options available.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to: findalogisticsservicesltd.hr@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Ready to grow with us? If you’re a digital native with a passion for storytelling and numbers, we want to hear from you.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Purchasing Officer",
  "description": "Hilton is the leading global hospitality company, spanning the lodging sector from luxurious full-service hotels and resorts to extended-stay suites and mid-priced hotels. For nearly a century, Hilton has offered business and leisure travelers the finest in accommodations, service, amenities and value. Hilton is dedicated to continuing its tradition of providing exceptional guest experiences across its global brands. Our vision to fill the earth with the light and warmth of hospitality unites us as a team to create remarkable hospitality experiences around the world every day. And our amazing Team Members are at the heart of it all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Purchasing Officer

Job Ref:&nbsp;HOT0CD6L
Job Location:&nbsp;Transcorp Hilton, Abuja

Job Description


	The Purchasing Officer will procure goods, works and services in compliance with procurement policies.
	Regular expediting and reporting of all procurement activities within the hotel.
	He or she maintains procurement data including supplier list and standards of goods, works and services, and ensures the effectiveness of procurement in timely and cost effective manner.


What will I be doing?


	The Purchasing officer will procure goods, works and services in compliance with procurement policies.
	He or she collects pro-forma invoices on approved purchase requisitions, prepares offer analysis and makes recommendations.
	Once the purchase order has been completed, the purchasing officer will follow up to assure/ensure delivery.
	He or she maintains procurement data including supplier list and standards of goods, works and services, and ensures the effectiveness of procurement in timely and cost effective manner.


As a Purchasing Officer, you will be involved in the procurement process for various items required by the Hotel and must therefore perform the following tasks to the highest standards:


	Assist with the preparation of a procurement plan
	Liaise with user departments&nbsp;to determine their product and service needs
	Receives approved Purchase Requisitions (PR) for procurement of goods and service
	Tracks all PRs and determine price competitiveness without sacrificing/compromising quality or delivery times
	Identifies and researches potential new suppliers
	Responsible for collection of proforma invoices and presents to the supervisor for further processing or approval
	Inquires immediately for more specifications from requesting department if the purchase request is not clearly specified and completed
	Assist in conducting vendor sourcing and documentation of vendor documents
	Ensures that purchases are made in the best interests of the company
	Assures/Ensures&nbsp;delivery and pickup of PO for collection of goods
	Prepares weekly procurement status report and submits to the supervisor


What are we looking for?


	HND / B.Sc Degree in any Business, Finance or Science related degree
	3 - 5&nbsp;years of experience in procurement or other supply chain management related fields
	Preference for a background in Hospitality.
	Knowledge of Birchstreet&nbsp;software is an added advantage.
	Planning and scheduling skills
	Excellent interpersonal skills, demonstrated ability to interact professionally with a culturally diverse staff, suppliers and consultants.
	Ability to work independently
	Excellent written and oral communication, in English
	Excellent grasp of Microsoft Office tools.
",

Purchasing Officer Job at Hilton Worldwide




        
    

        
        Hilton is the leading global hospitality company, spanning the lodging sector from luxurious full-service hotels and resorts to extended-stay suites and mid-priced hotels. For nearly a century, Hilton has offered business and leisure travelers the finest in accommodations, service, amenities and value. Hilton is dedicated to continuing its tradition of providing exceptional guest experiences across its global brands. Our vision to fill the earth with the light and warmth of hospitality unites us as a team to create remarkable hospitality experiences around the world every day. And our amazing Team Members are at the heart of it all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Purchasing Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Ref: HOT0CD6L
Job Location: Transcorp Hilton, Abuja

Job Description


	The Purchasing Officer will procure goods, works and services in compliance with procurement policies.
	Regular expediting and reporting of all procurement activities within the hotel.
	He or she maintains procurement data including supplier list and standards of goods, works and services, and ensures the effectiveness of procurement in timely and cost effective manner.


What will I be doing?


	The Purchasing officer will procure goods, works and services in compliance with procurement policies.
	He or she collects pro-forma invoices on approved purchase requisitions, prepares offer analysis and makes recommendations.
	Once the purchase order has been completed, the purchasing officer will follow up to assure/ensure delivery.
	He or she maintains procurement data including supplier list and standards of goods, works and services, and ensures the effectiveness of procurement in timely and cost effective manner.


As a Purchasing Officer, you will be involved in the procurement process for various items required by the Hotel and must therefore perform the following tasks to the highest standards:


	Assist with the preparation of a procurement plan
	Liaise with user departments to determine their product and service needs
	Receives approved Purchase Requisitions (PR) for procurement of goods and service
	Tracks all PRs and determine price competitiveness without sacrificing/compromising quality or delivery times
	Identifies and researches potential new suppliers
	Responsible for collection of proforma invoices and presents to the supervisor for further processing or approval
	Inquires immediately for more specifications from requesting department if the purchase request is not clearly specified and completed
	Assist in conducting vendor sourcing and documentation of vendor documents
	Ensures that purchases are made in the best interests of the company
	Assures/Ensures delivery and pickup of PO for collection of goods
	Prepares weekly procurement status report and submits to the supervisor


What are we looking for?


	HND / B.Sc Degree in any Business, Finance or Science related degree
	3 - 5 years of experience in procurement or other supply chain management related fields
	Preference for a background in Hospitality.
	Knowledge of Birchstreet software is an added advantage.
	Planning and scheduling skills
	Excellent interpersonal skills, demonstrated ability to interact professionally with a culturally diverse staff, suppliers and consultants.
	Ability to work independently
	Excellent written and oral communication, in English
	Excellent grasp of Microsoft Office tools.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Head of Operation Job at Kumbotso Microfinance Bank Limited




        
    

        
        Kumbotso Microfinance Bank Limited is a registered, insured financial institution located in the Kumbotso Local Government Area of Kano State, Nigeria. It operates as a unit microfinance bank under the regulation of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) and is recognized by the Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC).

We are recruiting intelligent, creative and resourceful personnel to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Operation

Job Location: Kano
Employment Type: Full-time

Eligibility
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	BSc or its equivalent in Banking & Finance, Accounting or any other management science discipline
	Minimum of (5) Five years of experience Banking in related industry in which (3) three-years must be in managerial positions.
	A Certificate in microfinance banking (CIBN) Is an Added Advantage


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications and CV to: info@kumbolsomfbank.com.na using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only applications received through the designated channel will be process and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
